explicit_text: During my college summers, I worked at the Homestake Mine. One of my roles was 'walking feed' at the stamp mill, feeding ore into the mill, and I also gained valuable experience at the counter-current-decantation pilot plant. This practical work was instrumental in shaping my understanding of mineral processing.
